top_signals.title: US Crude Oil Inventories Build As Hormuz Shipping Headache Drags On
top_signals.summary: The American Petroleum Institute (API) estimated that crude oil inventories in the United States rose by 2.603 million barrels in the week ending July 17. In the week prior, US crude oil inventories fell by 564,000 barrels. Although commercial crude oil inventories excluding the SPR have been falling rapidly for three months now, shedding just over 57 million barrels over the last thirteen weeks, US crude inventories are only down 7 million barrels so far this year, according to API data, kept in check by draws from the SPR. For the week ending…
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Trump to seek Congress approval for Saudi Arabia nuclear energy pact that lacks safeguards, sources say
top_signals.summary: Saudi Arabia's Crown Prince Mohammed bin Salman has long said if Iran developed a nuclear weapon, Saudi Arabia ​would ​too, fueling concern among arms control advocates.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Crypto Clarity Act still at mercy of ethics section as Democrats balk at Trump deal
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Want to diversify away from AI? Goldman says look at these stocks - CNBC
top_signals.summary: Want to diversify away from AI? Goldman says look at these stocks  CNBC

top_signals.title: PRA fines HDI Global SE £4,165,000 for inaccurate reporting of FSCS Liabilities and FSCS Fee Tariff data
top_signals.summary: The Prudential Regulation Authority (PRA) has imposed a financial penalty of £4,165,000 on HDI Global SE in connection with the submission of incorrect data to the PRA.

top_signals.title: Balance Coin crashes 99% after reported $915K exploit
top_signals.summary: Blockchain security firms linked the collapse to a suspected attack on 42DAO, the decentralized organization that governs the Balance Protocol ecosystem.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
